extra.reason: Git hooks (commit-msg, pre-commit, pre-push) added in hooks/ dir. Context7 section added to AGENTS.md. Section numbering updated. README updated with hooks setup step.
Stutter.h: per-sample rhythmic gate with EStutterRate enum (Off to 1/2 note), StutterState, stutterProcess(), tempo-synced. Wired into ProcessBlock riser path. Builds clean on all 4 formats.
MIDI CC1 (mod wheel) → Stutter Rate, CC11 (expression) → Stutter Depth. Uses ControlChange() normalised API. Both params also exposed as IParam for DAW automation.
Catch2 v3.7.1 wired via FetchContent. 6 smoke tests passing. CTest integrated.
Fixed: source buffers now padded with 5s silence before reverb, trimmed after. Build + tests pass.
42 unit tests implemented and passing across all DSP modules: Constants, BufferUtils, Reverb, TimeStretch, Stutter, SampleLoader
GitHub Actions CI live — macOS + Windows, builds + 42 tests, Node.js 24 actions
Debug Stage parameter implemented with 4 modes (Normal/Reverbed/Reversed/Riser Only). Intermediate buffers stored in RiserData, cached for stretch-only rebuilds. UAT Scenario 5 added.
